DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided EDAS is deactivated closed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the Empennage Door Actuation System (EDAS) with all doors in the closed position (AMM DDG 27-24-01).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker ACTUATOR-EMPENNAGE DOOR and lock with an INOP tag.
Set Flight Control Surfaces Panel (P5) TAIL switch to LOCK.
Set Control Stand Panel (P10) STAB switches to CUTOUT.
Verify all EDAS doors are in closed position.

Note.Para: For VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879 the associated EDAS doors are installed only on the vertical stabilizer surface.

ListItem.Para: For EDAS door not in closed position:
For EDAS actuator and linkage connected to door:
Gain access to the inoperative EDAS door actuator.
Press and hold actuator manual release button (ensure the black indicator stripe at base of button is not visible).
Manually rotate the EDAS door to closed position.
Release actuator manual release button (ensure the black indicator stripe at base of button is visible).
For EDAS actuator and linkage disconnected from door:
Gain access to the inoperative EDAS door actuator.
Disconnect broken linkage or remove actuator as needed.
Remove the lockout plate and retain lockout plate and screws for restoration.

Note.Para: Lockout plate from opposite side must be used to secure EDAS door closed.

ListItem.Para: Gain access to the opposite side EDAS door lockout plate.
Remove the lockout plate.
Manually rotate the EDAS door to the closed position.
Manually rotate the EDAS door to the closed position

Note.Para: Disconnect broken linkage or remove actuator as needed.

ListItem.Para: Manually rotate the EDAS door to the closed position.
Secure the EDAS door to the lockout plate.
Set Control Stand Panel (P10) STAB switches to NORM.
Set Flight Control Surfaces Panel (P5) TAIL switch to NORM.
